Agile & Operations
Process Design & Job Aids
3 samples
Job Aid
Scrum Events Cycle
Visual reference diagram mapping all scrum ceremonies — from quarterly planning through sprint retrospective. Designed to orient L&D team members and leadership during agile transformation at Optum.
🔧 Canva 👥 L&D Team + Leadership
Job Aid
Agile Process Flow for Requesters
Simplified three-step workflow guide for stakeholders submitting learning requests. Reduced confusion during intake redesign by giving requesters a clear, visual reference for how their projects moved through the agile system.
🔧 Canva 👥 Stakeholders & Requesters
Job Aid
Cognota Intake System Guide
Step-by-step job aid supporting the team’s migration to Cognota, a dedicated L&D project management platform. Combined annotated screenshots with embedded screencast videos for in-context guidance during the transition.
🔧 Canva + Screencast 👥 IDs + Leadership
eLearning Development
Storyline Course Samples
3 samples
Articulate Storyline
Dropped Objects: Course Introduction
Opening slide establishing learning objectives and course parameters for a 30-minute safety compliance course. Designed for oil and gas field workers with clear completion requirements and accessibility considerations.
📊 Oil & Gas Industry ⏱ 30 min course
Articulate Storyline
Personalized Learner Welcome
Interactive welcome screen using a Storyline variable to capture and display the learner’s name throughout the course — increasing engagement and creating a more personal learning experience for field workers.
⚙️ Variables + Interactivity 👥 Field Workers
Articulate Storyline
Interactive Tab Interaction
Exploratory interaction allowing learners to self-direct through six categories of dropped objects hazards. Replaces passive linear content with an active discovery model, improving engagement and knowledge retention.
💡 Interactive Design 🛡 Safety Compliance
Animated Video
Vyond Learning Videos
2 samples

These animated videos were developed to supplement virtual instructor-led training (VILT) sessions on agile practices. Custom characters, branded color palettes, and scenario-based content made complex process concepts accessible and memorable for L&D teams.

Vyond Animation
Agile Estimating Numbers
Animated explainer covering when and how estimating numbers can be adjusted in the agile process — including post-needs-assessment changes and communication protocols with project managers and supervisors. Used as a pre-work resource before VILT sessions.
🎥 Vyond 👥 IDs + Trainers 📋 VILT Supplement
Vyond Animation
Retro vs. Review: Quick Comparison
Side-by-side animated breakdown clarifying the distinct purposes, attendees, and outcomes of Sprint Retrospectives versus Sprint Reviews — a common point of confusion for teams new to agile. Designed to be rewatchable as a reference during the transformation.
🎥 Vyond 👥 IDs + Leadership 📋 VILT Supplement

Employee Onboarding System — Bloom Wellness Studio
